mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST (ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId})
mapper.select:
SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID /*동적 쿼리(최신, 조회순)*/
ORDER BY TBP.ID DESC
ORDER BY TBP.POST_READ_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY TBP.ID DESC

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID AND TBP.ID = #{id}
